qwiic_otos_init.tooltip: Initialize SparkFun Qwiic OTOS optical odometry sensor (I2C)

qwiic_otos_calibrate_imu.tooltip: Calibrate OTOS built-in IMU to remove accelerometer and gyroscope bias (sensor must remain still)

qwiic_otos_reset_tracking.tooltip: Reset OTOS tracking algorithm, set current position as origin
